correctness.details: Q1 query produces exactly 4 result rows (A,F | N,F | N,O | R,F) matching ground truth with 2 decimal place precision. All aggregates (sum, avg, count) are correct.

performance.notes: ~60M rows scanned in 420ms on 64-core system (8.7 user seconds across cores). Zone map skipping not yet applied (future optimization). Parallel execution across 64 threads with morsel-driven approach achieves good scaling.

optimizations_applied: Parallel scan with 64-thread morsel-driven execution (each thread processes every 64th row)
Long double (80-bit) precision for aggregate calculations to match exact ground truth
Efficient mmap-based column access with sequential read patterns
Hash-based grouped aggregation with 4 final groups (very low cardinality)
Single-pass multi-aggregate computation (SUM, AVG, COUNT simultaneously)

implementation_notes.encoding_handling: Dictionary decoding for l_returnflag and l_linestatus implemented correctly (codes 0/1/2 -> N/R/A and 0/1 -> O/F)
implementation_notes.date_filter: Correctly using epoch days (10471 = 1998-09-02) not YYYYMMDD format
implementation_notes.precision_critical: Used long double throughout aggregation pipeline to achieve exact match with floating-point ground truth
implementation_notes.dictionary_parsing: Custom parser for lineitem/dictionaries.txt file format (column names + tab-separated code/value pairs)
